Connector header · three-layer feasible set

Insertion pose set on the actual PCB socket

Drag to orbit, scroll to zoom, and move along the insertion path. Every small glyph is the constructive center of one bounded task cell; the detailed CAD gripper is shown for the selected center pose.

1 · Task-space set

Certified inner cells / unresolved outer cells inside the authored contact-mode domain.

2 · Robot-conditioned set

Same-branch GP7 discrete center-path witnesses. They remain provisional until TCP calibration and collision proof.

3 · Handoff preimage

This is a global current/donor-grasp partition, not a status of each receiver glyph.
